title: Episode 23 Impact Mechanics
wikitext:
[]: Episode 23 Impact Mechanics             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Sun Mar 06, 2016 3:53 pm I just finished rewatching Episode 23 DC, as i'm rewatching the whole series so there may be some aspects of how Impact's work that I have forgotten, but i'm concerned about the fight with Armisael in the episode. 1. Wouldn't Armisael merging with Unit-00 cause an Impact? 2. If not Unit-00, then surely it would with Unit-01 as its a clone of Lilith with the Fruit of Life?

[]: Re: Episode 23 Impact Mechanics             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 06, 2016 4:35 pm The combination that was going to happen there was (or at least seems potentially) pretty dangerous, yeah... Angel (Armisael)* Eva born of Adam Rei = Lilith's Soul Eva born of Lilith Shinji (Lilin) * Some speculation holds that Armisael was accompanied by the souls of her deceased siblings, as well. So you've got Lilith and Adam's flesh, Lilith's soul, and not one but TWO potential Impact triggers (an Angel and a Lilin). The only thing that's unclear is whether or not Eva-01 could serve as a Lilith surrogate without a Spear or replica thereof being involved. That Gendo mobilized Eva-01 against Armisael's threat suggests he wasn't worried about an Impact happening there. What he did seem concerned about was the Angel amalgam growing out of Eva-00's back, since that's what prompted him to act. NGE2 sadly provides no further information here, since the DC version of Armisael's attack shows up nowhere in the game. Too bad.

[]: Re: Episode 23 Impact Mechanics             Quote Post by Eliaskar » Sun Mar 06, 2016 5:00 pm Reichu wrote: The combination that was going to happen there was pretty dangerous, yeah... (snip)

[]: Re: Episode 23 Impact Mechanics             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Mar 06, 2016 5:34 pm Eliaskar wrote: SEELE seem pretty confident in EoE that they can initiate Third Impact without the Spear, up until it arrives.

Wouldn't Armisael merging with Unit-00 cause an Impact? 2. If not Unit-00, then surely it would with Unit-01 as its a clone of Lilith
